name: 5G-LENA NTN

notes: de facto open simulator for 3GPP NTN Rel-17+ studies

name: A-SABR
layers: CGR/SABR + variants (SPSN; alt pathfinding; volume management)
notes: emerging modern SABR/CGR reference decoupled from any BP stack

name: aiodtnsim
layers: Abstract bundles; pluggable CGR-family routing
notes: simulation companion to uD3TN in published routing evaluations

name: Argus-1
layers: Onboard ML inference (Jetson Orin Nano 8GB); CubeSat radio; no ISL
notes: Row overstates: single CubeSat not constellation; closed access but open design

name: CCC-LEO Dataset
layers: ICMP/IRTT latency; gRPC diagnostics
outputs: JSON; ping logs; CSV; Turnstile-gated HTTP download
notes: CCC-LEO is the infrastructure; LENS is its published dataset

name: CCC-LEO Testbed
layers: Real Starlink links; latency focus
scale: All Canadian provinces/territories + 30 dishes on 6 continents
outputs: Monthly public data releases; coverage map
notes: NSERC RTI funded; public access platform under development

name: CCSDS DTN Reference Scenarios
domain_detail: LEO, lunar and Mars communication scenarios
dynamics: Curated visibility windows plus planned and actual contact plans (schedule deviation captured explicitly)
layers: Scenario definition only: nodes, contacts, traffic, policy
scale: Three scenarios (low-earth-orbit, lunar-communication, mars-communication), v1.0 each
outputs: CSV (visibility, contacts) + JSON (nodes, traffic, policy) + AsciiDoc/PDF documentation; tool-neutral
publication: Companion to a CCSDS Yellow Book (SIS-DTN, 2026)
notes: Agency-endorsed common benchmark set for DTN tools; intended as shared input to simulators (DtnSim, DSNS) and stacks (ION, HDTN) so results are comparable. The planned-versus-actual contact split supports schedule-uncertainty studies.

name: Celestial
dynamics: TOML shell descriptors + SGP4; bounding-box live subset
layers: tc-netem links from geometry; full Linux stacks in microVMs; built-in DNS
scale: 66-sat Iridium class evaluated; Starlink shell-1 as motivating config
notes: Bounding-box suspension saves resources; WebRTC case study

name: CelesTrak
layers: N/A
outputs: TLE/3LE; OMM; JSON; CSV; XML via gp.php API
notes: De facto standard TLE source; SupGP includes operator ephemerides

name: Contact Plan Designer (CPD)
subtype: Contact plan computation and design tool
domain_detail: DTN-based space-terrestrial networks, LEO to interplanetary
dynamics: Keplerian two-body propagation; TLE/SGP4 and SPICE import; occlusion, elevation and boresight access conditions
layers: Access computation; conflict-free contact plan design (fair contact plan solver); timeline editing; 2D/3D/timeline visualization; CLI, local web app and Python API
real_stack_detail: Planning tool; exports feed real stacks
scale: Solar-system scale; Walker LEO constellations to interplanetary scenarios
inputs: YAML scenario files; TLE; SPICE kernels
outputs: ION and HDTN contact plans; IETF TVR; IPN-V scenario format; STK-style access CSV; JSON
maintenance_detail: Created 2026-06, active development, live site at contact-plan-designer.space
notes: Generates the contact plans consumed by ION, HDTN and DtnSim; exports to the IPN-V visualizer and IETF TVR YANG schedules. Open alternative to STK-based access computation.

name: CosmicBeats
layers: Orbits; LoRa-class PHY; MAC (CosMAC); compute and imaging models
scale: 1,000 IoT devices + 150 LEO sats in examples
notes: Application-agnostic; example parameters illustrative not validated

name: CosmicDance
subtype: TLE-driven orbital decay and shift analysis
layers: Orbit shift and decay measurement after solar events (Starlink case study)
notes: Links space weather events to connectivity-infrastructure risk. Successor: CosmicDancePro (arXiv:2604.22685).

name: cote
layers: Orbit; power/energy; compute; ground contact windows
notes: Strong compute/energy modeling; weak networking layers

name: DIPT HTTP

name: DIPT IP store-and-forward

layers: Network-layer queueing during disconnection
notes: STANDALONE REPO 404: capability realized inside workbench; fix URL in survey

name: DIPT NETCONF-over-QUIC proxy

notes: Unauthenticated by design (testing only)

name: DIPT Network scenarios

layers: Scenario description only
notes: STANDALONE REPO 404: lives inside workbench test-data/; fix URL in survey

name: DIPT QUIC Workbench

real_stack_detail: Real QUIC stack over simulated network

name: DIPT SCHC TAP
subtype: SCHC header compression over Linux TAP

layers: Adaptation-layer compression below IP

name: DSNS

name: From GEO to LEO in-flight dataset
